/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/lvgl_pixel_sim.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lvgl_pixel_sim.dir/src/sim_stubs.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/lvgl_pixel_sim.dir/Users/ifeng/develop/project/esp32-pixel/src/ui/lvgl_boot_wifi_screen.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lvgl_pixel_sim.dir/Users/ifeng/develop/project/esp32-pixel/src/ui/lvgl_stock_screen6.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lvgl_pixel_sim.dir/Users/ifeng/develop/project/esp32-pixel/src/ui/lvgl_mem_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lvgl_pixel_sim.dir/Users/ifeng/develop/project/esp32-pixel/src/ui/lv_font_silkscreen_regular_8.c.o" -o lvgl_pixel_sim  lvgl/lib/liblvgl.a -L/opt/homebrew/lib -lSDL2 -lm
